sections.instruction: Questions 1-5: Complete the form below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS OR A NUMBER. Questions 6-10: Answer the questions below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS.

Questions 11-14: Choose the correct letter A, B or C. Questions 15-17: Choose THREE answers from the box and write correct letter A-E. Questions 18-20: Complete the sentences below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer.

questions.content: The next event at the hotel will be
The number of guests will be

sections.instruction: Questions 21-25: Complete the flow chart below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for each answer. Questions 26-30: Answer the questions below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for each answer.

questions.content: What part of the assignment is Alan going to start working on? {{BLANK}}
Where will Melanie get more information on used paper collection? {{BLANK}}
What will they add to the assignment to make it more interesting? {{BLANK}}
What do they agree to complete by the end of the month? {{BLANK}}
Who will they ask to review their work? {{BLANK}}

sections.instruction: Questions 31-38: Complete the notes below. Write NO MORE THAN ONE WORD OR A NUMBER. Questions 39 and 40: Complete the summary below. Write ONE WORD ONLY for each answer.
